title: Service Providers API
description: The Service Providers API allows partners to manage service provider applications, onboarding, and retrieve service provider information.

apis.heading: Create Service Provider
apis.description: This API allows partners to create a new service provider application with company information and control fields.

reqParams.name: country
reqParams.description: Two-letter ISO country code where the service provider operates.

reqParams.name: organisation
reqParams.description: Organization details for the service provider.

reqParams.name: corporateId
reqParams.description: Corporate identification number of the organization.

reqParams.name: controlFields
reqParams.description: Control fields for service provider configuration.

reqParams.name: isServiceProvider
reqParams.description: Flag indicating whether this entity is a service provider.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data containing the application details.

resParams.name: applicationId
resParams.description: Unique identifier for the created service provider application.

resParams.name: webKybUrl
resParams.description: URL for the web-based KYB (Know Your Business) process.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Fetch Service Provider for Partner
apis.description: This API allows partners to retrieve all service providers associated with their partner account.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data containing service provider information.

resParams.name: serviceProviders
resParams.description: Array of service provider details.

resParams.name: serviceProviderId
resParams.description: Unique identifier of the service provider.

resParams.name: personId
resParams.description: Person identifier if applicable, null otherwise.

resParams.name: corporateId
resParams.description: Corporate identification number.

resParams.name: nationalId
resParams.description: National identification number if applicable, null otherwise.

resParams.name: serviceType
resParams.description: Type of service provided, null if not specified.

resParams.name: name
resParams.description: Name of the service provider, null if not specified.

resParams.name: address
resParams.description: Address information of the service provider.

resParams.name: addressLine1
resParams.description: First line of the address.

resParams.name: city
resParams.description: City of the address.

resParams.name: countryCode
resParams.description: Two-letter ISO country code.

resParams.name: postalCode
resParams.description: Postal code of the address.

resParams.name: phoneNumber
resParams.description: Phone number information.

resParams.name: number
resParams.description: Phone number.

resParams.name: code
resParams.description: Country code for the phone number.

resParams.name: role
resParams.description: Role associated with the phone number, null if not specified.

resParams.name: email
resParams.description: Email address of the service provider.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.description: This API allows merchants to retrieve all service providers associated with their merchant account.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data

resParams.description: Person identifier if applicable, null otherwise.

resParams.name: corporateId

resParams.description: National identification number if applicable, null otherwise.

resParams.name: serviceType
resParams.description: Type of service provided, null if not specified.

resParams.name: name
resParams.description: Name of the service provider, null if not specified.

apis.heading: Get All Service Provider Applications
apis.description: This API allows partners to retrieve all service provider applications with optional filtering by application type. Supported application types are ONBOARDING and RENEWAL.
apis.query: To Get All Service Provider Applications API pass in optional query param applicationType as string. Supported values: ONBOARDING, RENEWAL.

reqParams.name: applicationType
reqParams.description: Filter applications by type. Supported values are 'ONBOARDING' and 'RENEWAL'. Can be a single value or comma-separated values like 'ONBOARDING,RENEWAL'. If not provided, defaults to fetching ONBOARDING applications. Passed as a query parameter.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Array of service provider applications.

resParams.name: applicationId
resParams.description: Unique identifier of the application.

resParams.name: country
resParams.description: Country code where the service provider operates.

resParams.name: corporateId
resParams.description: Corporate identification number.

resParams.name: applicationStatus
resParams.description: Current status of the application.

resParams.name: createdAt
resParams.description: ISO timestamp when the application was created.

resParams.name: lastUpdatedAt
resParams.description: ISO timestamp when the application was last updated.

resParams.name: webKybUrl
resParams.description: URL for the web-based KYB process, if available.

resParams.name: legalName
resParams.description: Legal name of the service provider, if available.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.

apis.heading: Fetch Service Provider Application Status
apis.description: This API allows partners to retrieve the status of a specific service provider application by its ID.

resParams.name: status
resParams.description: Status of the request, indicated as either 'SUCCESS' or 'ERROR'.

resParams.name: data
resParams.description: Response data containing application status information.

resParams.name: onboardingStatus
resParams.description: Current onboarding status, null if not yet started.

resParams.name: applicationStatus
resParams.description: Current status of the application.

resParams.name: serviceProviderId
resParams.description: Service provider ID once approved, null if still pending.

resParams.name: message
resParams.description: A message that describes the status of the request.
